selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026
2200
Total Hours
7
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany

Why It's Important
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across teams.
02
Critical Upgrades
Implements crucial technology upgrades including Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure and performant.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces Config Items Management tool for safe packaging and migrating configurations across environments without risk.
Key Epics & Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling across domain boundaries.
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage latest language features, virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for tax operations.
Spring Boot 4.x.x Migration
Upgrade Spring Boot framework to latest version with enhanced observability, improved dependency management, native compilation support, and critical security patches.
Oracle 26ai Database
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered optimization, advanced analytics, and improved query performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
Tech Debt Across Teams
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction initiatives spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
Config Items Management
Build dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production environments without manual intervention.
Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026

agenticCustomInput:
Generate only slides for each  "initiative" found under the "initiative group" called "Core Self Service Capabilities" in "Estimates.xlsx".
"Total hours" value for the "initiative" can be found in the "Estimates.xlsx" where the value is in the "Initiative Total Hours" column.

Dont halucinate numbers. If you cannot find or calculate them, Write [NO DATA].
agenticJsonResponse:
{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Self Service Services Management
Core Self Service Capabilities · Solon Tax 2026
803.2
Total Hours
1
Epic
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Improved User Experience
Allows users to upload and manage attachments during the form-filling process (pre-save), providing form filing steps clarity and reducing unnecessary interruptions.
02
Fewer Incomplete Submissions
Reduces delays caused by missing attachments and ensures higher data integrity by allowing documents to be linked directly to relevant parties/roles at the point of entry.
03
Enhanced Form Management
Enables users to view, add, remove, and edit attachment metadata both before and after saving, with full audit trail logging of all modifications.
Key Epics & Features
Upload Before Save
Users (revenue officer or taxpayer) can upload attachments with permitted metadata while filling the form, before saving, including during registration forms where the relevant party is not yet created.
View and Manage Attachments
Users can view the list of uploaded attachments while filling the form (before saving) and manage attachments before and after saving, including adding new attachments, removing attachments, and editing metadata.
Link Attachments to Records
In RM, users can link attachments to additional system records (e.g., case file) while managing form attachments, enabling comprehensive document management across related records.
Failure Handling
If attachment upload fails, the user is clearly informed by a message that attachment was not successfully uploaded. Form saving/submission is not blocked and successfully uploaded files remain attached.
Audit Trail Logging
All attachment modifications after saving are stored in audit log, providing complete traceability and compliance with regulatory requirements for document management.
Non-Functional Requirements
Team alignment on Performance, Security, Accessibility, and Usability standards with comprehensive testing to ensure DODs are fulfilled and no issues are created.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
User & 3rd Party Access Management
Core Self Service Capabilities · Solon Tax 2026
3424.2
Total Hours
5
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Enhanced Traceability
Administrators gain full visibility into how and where representations were defined, resulting in improved traceability and stronger auditability of all user delegations.
02
Governance & Control
RM users with appropriate permissions can centrally define and manage taxpayer representations, resulting in improved compliance oversight and reduced fraud risk.
03
Automated Enforcement
Precise datetime and timezone controls enable automatic enforcement of access rights aligned with authorized validity periods, reducing manual administration effort.
Key Epics & Features
Representations: Additional Info in Agreements
Capture status, source system, and integration time of representations. Admin and procedures may log Source System, Purpose, External Created Datetime, and Requested by External System fields with optional defaults and system-generated Created/Last Modified timestamps.
Representations: Form Types and API Access
Define agreement services based on Form Types (View/Post BUSREG, VAT returns) and API access rights. Enable administrators to define in detail the forms and APIs that can be accessed by taxpayer representatives.
Representations: RM Management Capability
Enable RM users with Representation Management role to centrally define and manage representations affecting SS users. Support search, create, lifecycle management, automated expiration enforcement, and real-time RM/SS synchronization.
Representations: 2-Way & Multi-Level Enhancements
Support bidirectional authorization schemes and multiple delegation levels. Implement configurable lifecycle (Pending, Access Proposed, Access Denied, Access Granted, Access Revoked, Canceled) with cascade rules and audit logging.
Representations: DateTime & Timezone Management
Capture and manage Start Date and End Date as datetime with timezone support across Agreements, Agreement Services, and User Rights. Display in user timezone, calculate validity from system time, and handle DST transitions correctly.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"}]}}}
